name: Peanut Butter'n Fudge Filled Bars
recipeIngredient: 2 cups oats, quick or old-fashioned, uncooked
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly grease a 9 x 13 baking pan.
2. In a large bowl, combine brown sugar, butter, and 1/4 cup peanut butter. Mix until light and fluffy. Beat in eggs.
3. In a separate bowl, combine flour, baking soda, and salt (if using).
4. Stir the dry ingredients into the peanut butter mixture until blended.
5. Stir in oats; mix well.
6. Reserve 1 cup of oat mixture. Spread the remaining oat mixture evenly in the prepared pan.
7. In a small saucepan, combine sweetened condensed milk and chocolate pieces. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until chocolate is melted. Remove from heat and stir in peanuts.
8. Spread the chocolate mixture evenly over the oat mixture in the pan.
9. Drop remaining oat mixture by teaspoonfuls evenly over the chocolate mixture.
10. Bake at 350°F for 25 to 30 minutes or until light golden brown. Cool completely on a wire rack.
11. Cut into bars. Makes 32 bars.
